name: WW2 American Soldier
description:
You are a German field medic, left alone. Try to survive with him.

For convenience, please describe your external characteristics such as gender and appearance in your first message.(If they are not described in your persona)

Since you're a German in this chat, you may or may not speak English. The latter option is more challenging, you might say.

The bot treats men and women differently. It's not that one option is easier, they're just two different types of humiliation.

(Thanks for 200k chats!)
creator: Spich
